events.title: US Bombs Iranian Water Facilities in Retaliation
events.desc: The United States launched strikes targeting several water facilities in Iran, stating the action was in retaliation for Iran's downing of a US helicopter in the Strait of Hormuz. This escalates ongoing tensions between the two nations.

events.title: Ukraine-Made Missile Hits Target Deep Inside Russia
events.desc: A video has emerged showing a Ukrainian-made 'FP-5 Flamingo' cruise missile successfully striking a target approximately 900 km inside Russian territory. This demonstrates Ukraine's increasing long-range strike capabilities.

events.title: Pakistani Military Helicopter Crashes in Kashmir, All On Board Killed
events.desc: A Pakistani military helicopter crashed in the region of Muzaffarabad, Pakistan-administered Kashmir, resulting in the deaths of all individuals on board. The crash occurred amidst recent protests and a heavy security presence in the area.

events.title: Israeli Soldier Shoots and Kills Infant in Hebron
events.desc: An Israeli soldier fatally shot a seven-month-old baby in the head while firing at a Palestinian family's car in Hebron. This incident further inflames tensions in the occupied West Bank.

events.title: Amnesty Accuses Israel of 'Ethnic Cleansing' in West Bank
events.desc: Amnesty International has accused Israel of an 'ethnic cleansing' campaign against Bedouin and herding communities in the occupied West Bank. The rights group claims these actions aim to accelerate the annexation of Palestinian territory and are linked to forced displacement and settler violence.

events.title: Allies Condemn Iran's 'Lethal Plotting' in Multiple Countries
events.desc: The United States, Australia, and European allies have issued a joint statement condemning plots by Iran-backed groups to target dissidents, journalists, and Jewish communities in their respective countries. They demand Iran cease these actions immediately.

events.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes After Helicopter Downing
events.desc: The United States and Iran have engaged in retaliatory strikes following the downing of a US military helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz. This exchange strains a fragile ceasefire and raises concerns about further escalation.

events.title: Erdogan: Israel's Attacks on Syria, Lebanon Threaten Turkey
events.desc: Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan stated that Israel's ongoing attacks on Syria and Lebanon have escalated to a point where they also pose a threat to Turkey. He condemned Israel's aggression as a global threat requiring a halt.

events.title: UN Human Rights Office to Investigate Lebanon War Violations
events.desc: The UN Human Rights Office announced it will send investigators to Lebanon to assess potential violations of international law by all parties involved in the ongoing conflict. The investigation comes amid heightened tensions and military operations.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and their associated passwords have been leaked online, revealing significant security vulnerabilities across multiple ministries. This breach exposes sensitive information and could be exploited.

events.title: US Strikes Iran in Response to Helicopter Downing
events.desc: The US military has conducted strikes against Iranian targets in retaliation for the downing of a US military helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump vowed a response and accused Iran of shooting down the aircraft.

events.title: Israel Strikes Beirut Suburb Amidst Hezbollah Exchange
events.desc: Israel conducted strikes on a suburb of Beirut, stating the action was a response to Hezbollah rocket fire into Israeli territory. This attack occurred days after a US-brokered truce.

events.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes, Testing Ceasefire
events.desc: The US military has carried out strikes against Iranian drones and radar sites, while Iran claims to have targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain. This exchange represents a significant test of the existing ceasefire.

events.title: Israeli Strikes Kill 11 in Gaza City
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes on four residential buildings in Gaza City have resulted in the deaths of 11 people, including women and children. The Israeli military stated that four Hamas security officials were among the casualties.

events.title: Satellite Imagery Shows Demolitions in Southern Lebanon
events.desc: Satellite imagery reveals extensive damage and demolition across numerous towns and villages in southern Lebanon, with at least 46 out of 54 documented locations heavily affected or completely flattened. This destruction is occurring despite a fragile ceasefire.

events.title: US Strikes Iranian Police Infrastructure
events.desc: Bellingcat has documented at least 80 police stations and law enforcement/Basij infrastructure in Iran damaged or destroyed within the first three weeks of the US and Israeli conflict. Experts suggest the aim is to degrade the regime's 'repressive capacity'.
